steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The student argues that all areas need more shaded shelters because the highest percentage of bus stops with shaded shelter is only ______.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: C correctly fills the blank with the highest value (90%) from the table, showing that even the best area falls short of meeting the student’s implied threshold for adequacy. The other three choices (50%, 15%, 29%) either use smaller percentages that weaken the argument or contradict the idea of the highest value. That matches choice C — C is correct.
